creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 169314
update firefox and friends to 45.0.2

>Index: www/firefox/files/patch-bug1257947
>===================================================================
>--- www/firefox/files/patch-bug1257947	(revision 413259)
>+++ www/firefox/files/patch-bug1257947	(working copy)
>@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@
>  
>  [.] chrome.jar:
>  % content loop %content/ contentaccessible=yes
>+ % content loop-locale-fallback %content/locale-fallback/en-US/
> -% skin loop classic/1.0 %skin/linux/ os=Linux
> +% skin loop classic/1.0 %skin/linux/
>  % skin loop classic/1.0 %skin/osx/ os=Darwin

Adding or removing lines without updating hunk offset (@@ line) is fragile. Please, regen the file.
The rest looks fine.
